title: Gap Closure, Deliberate Practice, and Honest Positioning · Hiring Decision Lens: Gap Priority
summary: The role matrix exposes a few high-value gaps, but the candidate starts another broad course instead of testing whether each gap blocks real work. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gap priority increment in time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
Make and document a bounded apply, investigate, defer, or decline decision from fit, cost, risk, evidence, and learner priorities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Gap Priority · Theory Gap Priority
steps.instruction:
theory case — Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Gap Priority contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Gap Priority · Theory Gap Priority.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing. For Predict Gap Priority · Theory Gap Priority, keep Gap Priority connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Gap Priority condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

options.text: For predict gap priority, apply Gap Priority without its stated preconditions, omit the time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.text: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Gap Priority while producing time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing. A defensible solution applies Gap Priority, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-gap-priority — Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
focus: career-gap-priority
decision-evidence: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Every missing keyword needs a new credential before applying. This fails the Gap Priority contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers (Worker resource published 2024; reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.

steps.title: Defend the Gap Priority model · Theory Gap Priority
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Gap Priority: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.

Evidence target: Defend the Gap Priority model · Theory Gap Priority.
steps.why: Retrieving Gap Priority through the concrete time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Gap Priority model · Theory Gap Priority, keep Gap Priority connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
